title: Spotify Vibe Rush
previewText: Race through a music-themed playable ad, collect notes, dodge skips, and climb the leaderboard for a reward.
description: A safe metadata-only custom game submission for a music-themed playable ad demo.
gameBrief: Players move between lanes, collect branded music-note tokens, avoid skip blockers, and submit a score based on tokens collected, survival time, and clean dodges.
instructions: Use left and right controls to switch lanes. Collect music-note tokens, avoid skip blockers, and finish the timed run with the highest score possible.
targetAudience: Music listeners, Gen Z players, and fans of quick arcade challenges.
reward: Top 10 players get a free 1-month premium-style reward code in the demo.
securityNotes: Metadata only. No JavaScript, executable files, tracking pixels, or third-party network calls are included in this submission.
